ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of document */,
  "current_version" INTEGER /* Current version number of the document */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the document belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary owner of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the document */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_code") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template associated with this document type */,
  "default_permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default permission set for new documents of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the current version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the document was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser/device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the document */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the document */,
  "expires_on" TEXT /* Expiration date for the permission */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the workflow */,
  "workflow_step" TEXT /* Description of the workflow step */,
  "step_owner" INTEGER /* User ID of the person responsible for the step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the workflow step (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the workflow step */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the workflow step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_workflows_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the document */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_status_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
